issue_validation_scores.issue_description: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch. Business expenses must be submitted within 4 months from date of issuance. Manager approval required. Submit expense reimbursement form to direct manager with Local Employer cc'd payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com, indicating total amount in email body. Forward approved emails/documents and completed expense reimbursement template to payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com before 5th of month. Original invoices must be submitted before 20th of month according to local employer's invoice filing guidelines. Exchange rate documentation required - use spot exchange purchase price issued by Bank of China on first working day of month after returning from business trip. Foreign currency expenses must be entered line by line according to invoices.
issue_validation_scores.judge_explanation: The issue regarding additional documentation requirements is factually grounded. The compliance rules clearly state these requirements for China/GoGlobal, and the extracted data doesn't show evidence of these documents being provided.

issue_validation_scores.issue_description: Original invoice and deduction sheet must be sent to Local Employer's Dalian Branch. Business expenses must be submitted within 4 months from date of issuance. Manager approval required. Submit expense reimbursement form to direct manager with Local Employer cc'd payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com, indicating total amount in email body. Forward approved emails/documents and completed expense reimbursement template to payroll.all@talentbankglobal.com before 5th of month. Original invoices must be submitted before 20th of month according to local employer's invoice filing guidelines. Exchange rate documentation required - use spot exchange purchase price issued by Bank of China on first working day of month after returning from business trip. Foreign currency expenses must be entered line by line according to invoices.
issue_validation_scores.judge_explanation: The issue regarding additional documentation requirements is correctly categorized as "Standards & Compliance | Follow-up Action Identified" with proper field identification. The description accurately summarizes the extensive documentation requirements from the compliance policies for China, including submission deadlines, approval processes, and exchange rate documentation.
